Accounts with a Net Asset Value (NAV) of USD 100,000 (or equivalent) or more are paid interest at the full rate for which they are eligible. Accounts with NAV of less than USD 100,000 (or equivalent) receive interest at rates proportional to the size of the account. For example, an account with a NAV of USD 50,000 earns credit interest at a rate equal to one-half the rate paid by IBKR to accounts with a NAV of USD 100,000 or more.


要有USD100K asset 先有full rate
如果唔係要按比例計 例如USD 10K先得0.135%

replies.msg:
Idle cash 先有 cash 嘅利息。
留意佢係好似薪俸稅分層計，以你個例子，HKD 100K 嘅話頭 78K 嘅呢個 tier 係冇息，下一個 22K 嘅 tier 先有息。

借貨畀人嗰個係另一個 scheme，
叫 Stock Yield Enhancement Program，
一般都冇乜肉食，仲要同 IB 對分收入，當幫補吓月費咁解。
有無ib教學 操作好似幾複雜下

replies.msg:
https://futures.io/ib-trader-workstation/38573-ib-interactivebrokers-anyone-knows-how-equity-loan-change-calculated-stocks.html

Equity With Loan Value is the amount of funds you have available for trading. Its calculation is your settled cash, plus the market value of your positions, minus margin requirements.
They aren't taking that money from you. The true value of your account is listed under Net Liquidation Value, which is calculated as your cash plus the market value of your positions. Equity With Loan Value is just how they calculate risk to see if you can place trades. The subtracted Equity With Loan Value should be returned once your position is closed and the trade is settled.

似乎係你即時可以動用既錢即時少左 600 蚊
要等一段時間先再以用盡佢
